head: 1d5042d

ars_block_header: ACTION ARG SCHEMAS (canonical keys for all session-visible actions)
ars_confirmed_entries: exec__sandboxed_exec: {allow_subprocess, argv, env_passthrough, network, read_paths, timeout_seconds, write_paths}

scenarios.note: Direct alias; routing_decided+tool_executed; reply mentions P1-P8 principles
ARS has file__glob and file__grep but LLM chose file__list; empty result from src/; rubric not satisfied
All must_emit satisfied; reply references OpenAI SDK v2.30.0 (March 2026)
B38 ARS expansion caused correct action selection (web__fetch vs web__search in B37); but permission_denied+tool_failed; web_fetch_started not emitted; rubric not satisfied

B38 improvement: ARS includes exec__sandboxed_exec so LLM dispatches via invoke_action (B37 had started=0). Exec fails at runtime (pyenv libpython3.12 blocked by seatbelt returncode=-6). Rubric requires output=4 but stdout empty.
Ghost alias skill__lint_index_events not found; unchanged from B37

B37=V (inline reply); B38=I: LLM attempted rag.operation__recall (now in ARS with sources field) but omitted required sources arg -> KeyError:'sources'. Reply acknowledged error and asked how to proceed. routing_decided satisfied; no fabrication. Borderline I (error message not same as 'no sources found')

criteria.description: Is the text concise and mentions at least one Reyn principle?

scenarios.note: B38 judge postprocessor schema fix (29a0c31) correct but untestable here: skill aborted at judge phase (artifact_path='artifact_path' literal, file not found). B37 had validation_error (postprocessor); B38 has workflow_aborted (earlier). No verdict emitted in either batch.
Both turns inline reply. T1: asked 'What would you like to name the skill?'; T2: rejected 'my_demo_skill' (said not snake_case). No skill_builder spawned. Unchanged from B37.

key_findings: F1: S8 judge schema fix (29a0c31) correct but S8 scenario cannot exercise it (requires real artifact_path on disk). B37 failure=validation_error; B38 failure=workflow_aborted (earlier). 3 Tier 2 unit tests added validate the fix at code level.

F2: D2-wrapper ARS scope expansion confirmed active (request a77f7590): all 17 static ops + skills + peers listed unconditionally. Header: 'all session-visible actions' (vs 'current hot-list actions' B37).
F3: S4 ARS expansion improved action selection (web__fetch chosen vs web__search in B37). Still R due to permission denied in environment.
F4: S2 ARS expansion does not fix action selection preference: file__list still chosen over file__glob/file__grep despite being in ARS. ARS guides arg names, not action choice.
F5: S7 V->I regression caused by ARS expansion: rag.operation__recall now in ARS, LLM attempts it but omits sources arg -> KeyError. B37 LLM replied inline avoiding the error.
F6: S5 behavior improvement (still R): sandboxed_exec now dispatched (started=1 vs B37 started=0). Exec fails at runtime (pyenv sandbox), not dispatch level.
